source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: The Flex With A Secret
archetype.receipt: 5 roles at 100+ games, but a 5.2-point winrate gap between best and worst — versatility is hiding a specialty.

entries.change: Move your offlane games to jungle
Queue jungle instead of your average mix
entries.receipt: 52.8% there vs 50.0% overall, 176 games of evidence

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

plan: Queue jungle as primary. It is your best role at 52.8% over 176 games (your overall is 50.0%). Set support as secondary, not the other way around.
Stop queueing offlane: 43.4% over 159 games is costing real VP. When auto-filled there, play your safest comfort pick, not a learning pick.
Two-hero rule for the climb: Yin and Skylar. You beat the field on them by +4.8 and +5.0 points of winrate.
Your champion pool is 15+ heroes wide and your top three are only 38% of your games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on your top three.
The math: you are at 622 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. Your all-time peak is 903 — you have already touched Platinum-level rating once; this is a consistency problem, not a ceiling problem.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward your own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where you win, not why

insights.title: Skylar is not just your best hero, it is your most disciplined
insights.finding: On Skylar you die 3.9/game vs your 4.6 average. The winrate edge is partly a discipline edge; that habit can travel to other picks.
insights.receipt: 129 games on Skylar, 53.7% shrunk vs field 48.7%

insights.title: Mr_Meat31 brings out your best
insights.finding: Your record alongside Mr_Meat31 is 54% over 291 ranked games — your strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of you queue, make it this one.

insights.title: Gadget is the long-term relationship
insights.finding: 233 games and you genuinely out-pilot the field on Gadget (+2.2 points). The hours show.

insights.title: For the group chat
insights.finding: 2 pentakills on record and a 18-kill spree. Willy has receipts.
